title: Find the Winner of an Array Game
hints: Notice that once the current maximum of the array reaches the front, it can never lose. How does this affect the search if k is very large?
Simulate the game round by round, keeping a counter for consecutive wins. You do not need to actually rotate the array; just track the current winner.
Stop the simulation as soon as a winner reaches k consecutive wins, or when the global maximum reaches the front, since it will then win indefinitely.
